chapter_title.en: What Garments Are Permissible for Prayer and What Garments Are Not

text: 758 - وَقَالَ أَمِيرُ اَلْمُؤْمِنِينَ صَلَوَاتُ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ: «اَلسَّيْفُ بِمَنْزِلَةِ اَلرِّدَاءِ تُصَلِّي فِيهِ مَا لَمْ تَرَ فِيهِ دَماً وَ اَلْقَوْسُ بِمَنْزِلَةِ اَلرِّدَاءِ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.758 - The Commander of the Faithful Imam Ali ibn Abi Talib (as) said:
"A sword is like a garment; you may pray with it as long as you do not see any blood on it. A bow is also like a garment."
